name: WF-02-recipe Extract Recipe Data

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { title: $json.body.title || '', description: $json.body.description || '', video_id: $json.body.videoId || '', youtube_channel: $json.body.youtubeChannel || '', video_url: 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=' + ($json.body.videoId || ''), thumbnail_url: $json.body.thumbnail || '', published_date: $json.body.publishedAt || '' } }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO recipes (
  title, category, description, recipe_text, ingredients, steps, nutrition,
  youtube_url, youtube_channel, thumbnail_url, video_id,
  transcript, transcript_language, transcript_source, transcription_warning,
  processed, created_at, updated_at
+) VALUES (
  $1, $2, $3, $4::jsonb, $5::jsonb, $6::jsonb, $7::jsonb,
  $8, $9, $10, $11, $12, $13, $14, $15,
  false, NOW(), NOW()
+)
ON CONFLICT (video_id) DO UPDATE SET
  title = EXCLUDED.title,
  category = EXCLUDED.category,
  description = EXCLUDED.description,
  recipe_text = EXCLUDED.recipe_text,
  ingredients = EXCLUDED.ingredients,
  steps = EXCLUDED.steps,
  nutrition = EXCLUDED.nutrition,
  transcript = EXCLUDED.transcript,
  transcript_language = EXCLUDED.transcript_language,
  transcript_source = EXCLUDED.transcript_source,
  transcription_warning = EXCLUDED.transcription_warning,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING id, video_id, title;

description: Transcribe one YouTube video, extract a Ukrainian recipe, persist it, then respond
